purpose: Conformance substrate for action-ref-v1 envelopes that carry an opaque delegation_ref field. An external implementer who reproduces action_ref and envelope_canonical_sha256 byte-identical from the stated preimage and envelope fields has a conformant implementation.
reproduce_in_python:
import hashlib, json
def jcs(obj): return json.dumps(obj, separators=(',',':'), sort_keys=True, ensure_ascii=False)
action_ref = hashlib.sha256(jcs(preimage).encode()).hexdigest()
envelope_sha256 = hashlib.sha256(jcs(envelope).encode()).hexdigest()

vectors.description: Envelope with opaque delegation_ref field. The delegation_ref value is treated as an opaque string by the action-ref derivation: it does NOT enter the preimage. Only the four canonical preimage fields (action_type, agent_id, scope, timestamp) determine action_ref. delegation_ref is carried in the envelope for attestation linkage only.

notes.delegation_ref: Opaque string — arbitrary format chosen by the delegating authority. Not interpreted by action-ref derivation. The invariant: removing or changing delegation_ref does NOT change action_ref, but DOES change envelope_canonical_sha256.
notes.scope_convention: mycelium:delegation marks this as a first-party Mycelium delegation action. Third-party implementers should use their own namespace prefix.
